title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: iptables bug fix update
overview: An update for iptables is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The iptables utility controls the network packet filtering code in the Linux kernel.Bug Fix(es): [Azure][WALA][RHEL-10]WARNING: Failed to get firewall packets (JIRA:RHEL-72061)  iptables or iptables-translate command does not support icmptype 15 and 16  (JIRA:RHEL-85286)

fixes.description: iptables or iptables-translate command does not support icmptype 15 and 16

full_text:
An update for iptables is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The iptables utility controls the network packet filtering code in the Linux kernel.Bug Fix(es): [Azure][WALA][RHEL-10]WARNING: Failed to get firewall packets (JIRA:RHEL-72061)  iptables or iptables-translate command does not support icmptype 15 and 16  (JIRA:RHEL-85286)
